zh.lifeSummary: 當Letitia Randall於1541年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾蕾托 米森登時，她的父親John Randall41歲，母親Joyce Caldwell42歲。她於1560年11月15日與David Childe在英國巴金哈姆爾哈爾方特 聖 彼得結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1591年4月在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾法爾納姆 羅雅爾享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安聖 瑪麗 馮 維吉恩斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Letitia Randall于1541年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾蕾托 米森登时，她的父亲John Randall41岁，母亲Joyce Caldwell42岁。她于1560年11月15日与David Childe在英国巴金哈姆爾哈爾方特 聖 彼得结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1591年4月在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾法爾納姆 羅雅爾享年50岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安聖 瑪麗 馮 維吉恩斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Randall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): common colloquial pronunciation of   Randolph  .

variants.name: Randell
meanings: English: variant of   Randall  .
Americanized form of German   Randel  .

variants.name: Randon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel.
English: probably a variant of Randall , with assimilation of n-l to n-n.
French (northern): from the ancient Germanic personal name Rando, a short form of names based on the element rand ‘rim (of a shield), shield’.

variants.name: Randol
meanings: English: altered form of   Randall  .

variants.name: Randal
meanings: English: variant of   Randall  .
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Randal in Gulen, a compound of Old Norse runnr ‘copse, thicket, grove’ + dalr ‘valley’.

variants.name: Randles
meanings: English and Irish (Louth): variant of Randall , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. In Ireland this is sometimes a variant of Reynolds .

variants.name: Randle
meanings: English: variant of   Randall  .
Americanized form of German Randel or of its Bavarian variant Randl.

variants.name: Rendell
meanings: English (Somerset, Devon, and Dorset): variant of   Randall  .

variants.name: Randel
meanings: English: variant of   Randall  .
South German: variant of   Rand   3.

variants.name: Randolph
meanings: English and German: from Randolf, an ancient Germanic personal name composed of the elements rand ‘rim (of a shield), shield’ + wolf ‘wolf’. This was introduced into England by the Normans in Old French forms of two different ancient Germanic personal names which became confused with each other: Randulf (from rand ‘(shield-)edge’ + wulf ‘wolf’) and Rannulf (from hraf(a)n ‘raven’ + wulf ‘wolf’).

History: An American family bearing this surname are descended from William Randolph (c. 1651–1711), a planter and merchant, a member of a family that originally came from Sussex, England. William Randolph emigrated from Warwickshire to VA c. 1673. He was a forebear of Thomas Jefferson and Robert E. Lee. Randolph had seven sons, each of whom inherited an estate, the name of which was sometimes added to their own, such as Sir John Randolph of Tazewell. His great-grandsons included Edmund Randolph (1753–1813), first attorney general of the US and one of the framers of the US Constitution, and the diplomat and statesman John Randolph of Roanoke (1773–1833), who served as US minister to Russia.

variants.name: Rendall
meanings: English: variant of   Randall  .
Scottish: habitational name from Rendall (Orkney), named with a stream-name of uncertain origin + Old Norse dalr ‘valley’.
In some cases possibly also an Americanized form of Swedish   Rendahl  .

nameMeanings.name: Letitia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified spelling of   Laetitia  , which has recently enjoyed a rise in popularity in Britain, notably among West Indians.

en.lifeSummary: When Letitia Randall was born in 1541, in Little Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Randall, was 41 and her mother, Joyce Caldwell, was 42. She married David Childe on 15 November 1560, in Chalfont St Peter, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in April 1591, in Farnham Royal, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in St Mary the Virgin's Church, Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.St Mary the Virgin's Church, Amersham, B: St Mary the Virgin's Church, Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Letitia Randall est née en 1541, à Little Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Randall, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Joyce Caldwell, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé David Childe le 15 novembre 1560, à Chalfont St Peter, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en avril 1591, à Farnham Royal, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à St Mary the Virgin's Church, Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Letitia Randall 1541 in Little Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Randall 41 und ihre Mutter Joyce Caldwell 42. Sie hat am 15. November 1560 in Chalfont St Peter, Buckinghamshire, England David Childe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im April 1591 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Farnham Royal, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Mary the Virgin's Church, Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Letitia Randall è nata il nel 1541 nel Little Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Randall, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Joyce Caldwell, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato David Childe il 15 novembre 1560, nel Chalfont St Peter, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1591, nel Farnham Royal, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a St Mary the Virgin's Church, Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Letitia Randallが1541年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアリットル ミセンデンで生まれた時，父John Randallは41歳，母Joyce Caldwellは42歳であった。1560年11月15日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアチャルフォント スト ペターでDavid Childeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1591年4月にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアファルンハム ロイアルで50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイメルシャムスト マリー ス バージン'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary the Virgin's Church, Amersham, B: 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 어머샤 스트 메리 테 버긴'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Letitia Randall(이)가 1541년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 리틀 미센든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Randall(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joyce Caldwell(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1560년 11월 15일 영국 벅잉함실르 차폰트 스트 피터에서 David Childe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1591년 4월 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 패른함 로야에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 어머샤 스트 메리 테 버긴'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Letitia Randall nasceu em 1541, em Little Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Randall, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Joyce Caldwell, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com David Childe em 15 de novembro de 1560, em Chalfont St Peter, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em abril de 1591, em Farnham Royal, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em St Mary the Virgin's Church, Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Mary the Virgin's Church, Amersham, B: ст мэри т виргин'с чурч, амиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Letitia Randall родилась в 1541 г. в местности литл миссенден, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Randall было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Joyce Caldwell, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David Childe 15 ноября 1560 г. в местности халфонт ст питир, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла апрель 1591 г. в местности фарнам рояль, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности ст мэри т виргин'с чурч, амиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Letitia Randall nació en 1541, en Little Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Randall, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Joyce Caldwell, tenía 42 años. Se casó con David Childe el 15 de noviembre de 1560, en Chalfont St Peter, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en abril de 1591, en Farnham Royal, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en St Mary the Virgin's Church, Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
